reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom (sakura) spots in Tohoku. Tool returned generic Akita spots (museums, toll booths, archaeological sites, shrines) with no sakura filtering. Famous Akita sakura spots like Kakunodate or Hirosaki Park are missing. Data is grounded but topic-mismatched.
missing_data: Known sakura sites: 角館武家屋敷, 真人公園, 桧木内川堤; categorical/keyword tagging absent
improvement_hint: Add a keyword/category filter (e.g. 'sakura', 'cherry blossom') so prefecture queries can narrow to seasonal-themed spots, or surface a 'seasonal_tags' field.

reasoning: User asked for Niigata sake breweries. get_local_specialty returned MAFF GI food items (chamame, snow carrots, lotus root) with no sake breweries. Niigata is Japan's premier sake region; absence is a major retrieval gap. Items shown are accurate but off-intent.
missing_data: Major Niigata kura: 八海醸造, 朝日酒造(久保田), 菊水, 今代司 — none in MAFF GI dataset for sake
improvement_hint: Integrate the National Tax Agency's GI sake list (清酒) and brewery directories so 'sake' queries return brewery entities rather than only MAFF agricultural GIs.

reasoning: Hakuba ski resorts + onsen query, but tool returned only 6 Hakuba spots — mostly municipal admin pages ('観光課', '観光商工係') and a museum. No actual ski resorts (Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake) or onsen properties surfaced.
missing_data: 白馬八方尾根スキー場, 白馬五竜, 白馬岩岳, 白馬みみずく温泉, 白馬八方温泉
improvement_hint: Filter out admin/department-name municipal scrapes (low signal) and ensure ski resorts and onsen ryokan from OSM/Wikidata reach the top-N for ski regions like Hakuba.

reasoning: Query is autumn-foliage in Kansai. get_spots(Kyoto) returned generic spots (museums, shrines, tombs, sports park) with no autumn/momiji filtering. Famous spots like Tofukuji, Eikando, Arashiyama momiji not surfaced. Kansai also implies multi-prefecture coverage missing.
missing_data: 東福寺, 永観堂, 嵐山, 神護寺 momiji tagging; multi-prefecture (Osaka/Hyogo/Nara/Shiga) merge
improvement_hint: Add seasonal tags (momiji, sakura) on spots and support region (Kansai/Tohoku) queries that fan out across constituent prefectures.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai sakura spots. Returned generic Nara prefecture entries (Daibutsu, Nara Park, ruins). Yoshinoyama (most famous Kansai sakura site) is absent. No Arabic localization in response.
missing_data: 吉野山 (Yoshinoyama, world-class sakura site), 又兵衛桜, 氷室神社; ar localization
improvement_hint: Tag iconic seasonal sites (Yoshinoyama) with sakura keywords and add Arabic name fields when available.

reasoning: Query is stargazing on Okinawa remote islands. Returned castles, German village, parks — no Iriomote, Hateruma (Japan's southernmost certified Dark Sky), or Ishigaki astronomy sites. Constraint '離島' (remote islands) ignored.
missing_data: 波照間島, 西表石垣国立公園 (国際ダークスカイ協会認定), 石垣島天文台
improvement_hint: Index Dark Sky designated areas as a separate facet; allow filtering by 'island_type=remote' so remote-island queries don't dilute with Naha results.

reasoning: Thai query for rural onsen ryokan in Hokkaido. Tool returned urban Sapporo/Kushiro hotels (ANA Holiday Inn, Crowne Plaza) and Niseko apartments — no rural onsen ryokan. lodging_type filter (onsen_ryokan) not applied.
missing_data: Noboribetsu, Jozankei, Sounkyo, Niseko Konbu Onsen ryokan
improvement_hint: Support lodging_type=onsen_ryokan filter and rural/urban classification (population density of municipality) so 'rural onsen' queries don't return business hotels in the prefectural capital.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands worth visiting. Kagawa response includes Naoshima art museums (Lee Ufan, Chichu) — relevant — plus Ritsurin/Takamatsu Castle (mainland). Shodoshima's Angel Road included. But Teshima, Megijima, Ogijima not surfaced; restricting to Kagawa misses Hiroshima/Okayama islands.
missing_data: 豊島美術館, 直島(本村), 小豆島(オリーブ園), Hiroshima/Okayama Setouchi islands
improvement_hint: Add a 'region:Setouchi' multi-prefecture aggregation and an island/mainland flag so island-focused queries surface only insular spots.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo (藍染) workshops in Tokushima. METI returned 阿波正藍しじら織 and 阿波和紙 (indigo-dyed paper) — both relevant designations — plus unrelated Otani Ware. But no workshop venues (e.g. アイ・ラブ・アイ館, Buaisou) included; designation list ≠ workshops.
missing_data: Workshop venues (アイの館, Buaisou Studio, 藍住町歴史館)
improvement_hint: Cross-link MAFF/METI designations with municipal scraped pages of associated workshops/museums so users get visitable venues, not only the craft designation metadata.

reasoning: German query for Koyasan shukubo (temple lodging). Tool returned Wakayama hotels (Kii Tanabe business hotel, Kushimoto, Marriott Shirahama) — none on Mt Koya. Shukubo (52 temples on Koyasan) not in dataset or not filtered.
missing_data: 高野山 52 shukubo (恵光院, 一乗院, 福智院 etc.); lodging_type=shukubo/temple
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=shukubo (temple lodging) and ensure Koyasan temple-stay properties are seeded from official Koyasan tourism data.

reasoning: search_area('武家屋敷') returned 92 matches: Shimane, Fukui (Uchiyama), Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Kanazawa Nagamachi — strong off-Kyoto coverage. But many results are long Chinese/Korean tourism-portal pages with little structured info; expression_quality drops due to verbose narrative.
missing_data: Better deduplication; structured city/era fields per district
improvement_hint: Truncate municipal_scrape descriptions to lead paragraph and add structured fields (samurai_district, era, status) so agent can rank cleanly.

reasoning: Indonesian query for summer festivals in Akita. Returned 3 cultural-property festivals (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate, Tsuchizaki Shinmei) — Tsuchizaki is summer (July). But Akita Kanto Matsuri (top-3 Tohoku summer festival) absent. National_heritage list pads non-Akita items.
missing_data: 秋田竿燈まつり (Akita Kanto), 西馬音内盆踊り, 大曲花火 — flagship summer festivals
improvement_hint: Ingest 観光庁 major-festival list (3大祭り, 東北六魂祭) so flagship summer festivals appear above intangible-property entries.

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing port towns in San'in. Returned generic Shimane spots (castles, museums, Izumo Taisha, Iwami Ginzan). No fishing villages like Mihonoseki, Hashima, Karakawa. Constraint '漁港 / 항구마을' ignored.
missing_data: 美保関, 唐川, 仁摩, 浜田漁港 fishing villages
improvement_hint: Add a place_type tag (fishing_port, mining_town) on spots so port/village queries don't return major shrines and museums.

reasoning: Gifu washi query. METI returned 9 craft items including Mino Ware ceramics, Hidehira-nuri lacquer, etc. Mino Washi (本美濃紙) is presumably present further down. Designations are correct but no workshop venues for hands-on washi-making experience.
missing_data: 美濃和紙の里会館 workshop venue; explicit washi-making experience locations
wrong_data: Hidehira-nuri primary area is 岩手県 not Gifu — appears here only because Gifu is co-listed; could mislead
improvement_hint: Surface visitable workshop venues alongside METI designations, and clarify when a craft is co-designated across prefectures with the primary production area.

reasoning: Spanish query for fishing villages in Noto Peninsula. Returned mostly Kanazawa city items (museums, Kenrokuen, Oyama Shrine) — Kanazawa is south of Noto. Only Nanao Castle and Keta Shrine touch Noto. No fishing villages.
missing_data: 輪島, 珠洲, 蛸島, 舳倉島 漁村; Noto-area place_type=fishing_village
improvement_hint: Allow sub-prefecture filtering by peninsula/region (e.g. region=Noto) so Kanazawa central spots don't dominate when user asks about Noto.

reasoning: search_area('砂丘') returned 84 matches but top hits are Tottori-centric (the very thing user asked to exclude). Other dunes (中田島, 庄内, 吹上浜, 猿ヶ森) buried or absent in shown sample. Verbose multilingual portal pages dominate.
missing_data: 中田島砂丘 (静岡), 庄内砂丘 (山形), 吹上浜 (鹿児島), 猿ヶ森砂丘 (青森)
improvement_hint: Implement query exclusion ('not Tottori') and rank lesser-known matches above tourism-portal landing pages; add a dune entity index from Wikidata.

reasoning: Chinese query for traditional crafts in San'in/Shimane. Returned 4 METI-designated crafts: 石見焼, 石州和紙, 雲州そろばん, 出雲石燈ろう — all bona fide Shimane crafts with high-confidence Chinese translations. Solid, on-intent answer.
missing_data: Could include Tottori (the other San'in prefecture) co-coverage
improvement_hint: Support multi-prefecture region queries (region=San'in includes 鳥取+島根) for cross-prefecture craft listings.

reasoning: Lavender beyond Furano in Hokkaido. Returned beer museum, art parks, clock tower, Shikisai-no-Oka (relevant — Biei flower farm), Hakodate museums, Kushiro wetland. Most lavender-specific sites (Tomita Farm, Saika no Sato, Higashimokoto) absent or buried.
missing_data: ファーム富田 (Furano excluded but its sister farms exist), 上富良野日の出公園, 中富良野町営ラベンダー園, 札幌幌見峠
improvement_hint: Tag flora-themed spots (lavender, sunflower, tulip) and support exclusion filters ('exclude:Furano') so the 'beyond Furano' constraint is honored.

reasoning: Filipino query — likely '伝統的な町並み' (traditional towns) in Kyushu, mistranslated to 'kape (coffee)'. Returned Oita prefecture items (Rakutenchi amusement park, African Safari, Funai Castle, Marine Palace Aquarium) — neither old townscapes nor coffee. Yufuin/Beppu old streetscapes absent.
missing_data: 杵築, 日田豆田町 (Oita 重伝建), 内子, 美々津 traditional preservation districts
improvement_hint: Add 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 (重伝建) as a structured facet so 'old townscape' queries surface preservation districts.

reasoning: Query asks for 古民家 (kominka traditional house) lodging in Hokuriku. Returned student housing, AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza Kanazawa, 'Kanaya' guest house — generic urban lodging, no kominka. Many entries lack name (just 'Student housing 1').
missing_data: 輪島・能登 古民家ステイ, 五箇山合掌, kominka lodging_type tag
wrong_data: OSM 'Student housing 1' surfaces as a hotel — questionable
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=kominka (traditional house) and exclude OSM placeholder names like 'Student housing N'.

reasoning: Kii Peninsula mountain shrines via get_japan_heritage(Wakayama). Returned 7 Japan Heritage stories — relevant cultural framework (whaling culture, Yuasa soy sauce, presumably Kumano stories). But specific mountain shrines (Kumano Sanzan, Koyasan) need to be the primary answer; heritage stories surround but don't list shrines directly.
missing_data: 熊野本宮大社, 熊野那智大社, 熊野速玉大社, 高野山金剛峯寺 — direct shrine entities
improvement_hint: Pair get_japan_heritage with linked shrine entities; for queries about 'shrines' route to get_spots filtered by religion=shinto with mountain altitude/location flag.

reasoning: Sea of Japan summer fireworks query. get_festivals(Niigata) returned count=0 prefecture items, only national_heritage list of unrelated festivals (Kawagoe Hikawa, Ueno Tenjin, Kamezaki Shiohi). Major hanabi festivals (Nagaoka, Kashiwazaki) entirely missing.
missing_data: 長岡まつり大花火大会, 柏崎海の大花火大会 — flagship Niigata Sea-of-Japan hanabi
wrong_data: national_heritage list in this response includes festivals from Saitama, Mie, Aichi — not Niigata; could confuse agent
improvement_hint: Ingest 全国花火大会 dataset and constrain national_heritage padding to actually-relevant prefecture/region; empty count=0 with off-region padding is misleading.

reasoning: Query for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. METI returned 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts) — exactly the canonical answer — plus 博多織 (cross-listed via Oita). Description, materials, eight techniques all correct. Solid, on-intent.
missing_data: Workshop venues (大分県立竹工芸訓練センター, 別府市竹細工伝統産業会館)
improvement_hint: Cross-link METI craft designations with workshop/museum venues for hands-on experiences.

reasoning: Cycling routes through rural Shikoku. Returned Ehime spots (Imabari Castle, Ashizuri-Uwakai NP, museums, Dogo Park, Shimonada Station). Shimanami Kaido — the world-famous cycling route from Imabari — is not surfaced as a route entity, just Imabari Castle.
missing_data: しまなみ海道 cycling route entity, とびしま海道, アクアパーク sites along route
improvement_hint: Add cycling_route as a first-class entity type (Shimanami Kaido, Tobishima Kaido) sourced from MLIT/Ehime cycling portal.

reasoning: Kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returned 183 items — Nogaku, festivals, Yobuko Otsunahiki etc. — but no keyword filter for kabuki. Geji-kabuki, Konpira Kabuki (Kanamaruza), Aizu Tanagura Kabuki, regional ji-kabuki venues likely buried in 183.
missing_data: 金丸座(琴平), 中村座, 内子座, 地芝居 (ji-kabuki) venues — kabuki-specific tagging
improvement_hint: Apply keyword='kabuki' filter at tool layer and surface ji-kabuki (地芝居) regional theater venues as a distinct facet, paired with playhouse buildings.
